meaning: vt.允诺,答应n.允诺,答应,许诺
examples: What anyone else promises you doesn't count. Only what you can decide for yourself actually counts.
Their future was full of promise.
She kept her promise to visit them.
For consumers, there will be the promise of benefits if they share their personal data.
Cocktails, conversations with fellow film buffs and dancing to Bollywood beats promise to make this a stellar evening.
